name: agentic-commerce-readiness
description: Agentic Commerce Readiness Desk - AI shopping readiness audit for Shopify and DTC storefronts

scripts.validate: node --check app.js && node --check collector-playwright.js && node --check dev-server.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('audit.json','utf8')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('audit-schema.json','utf8')); console.log('json ok')"
